all_violations.description: Assertion for thread ID stability is guarded by a conditional branch, so the key invariant can be skipped.
all_violations.suggestion: Assert non-null ID first, then assert exact stability without conditional branching.

all_violations.description: Mock response path uses in-test branching by dispatch attempt count.
all_violations.suggestion: Prefer explicit dedicated tests or deterministic route fixtures per scenario.

all_violations.description: Correlation IDs are randomized, which can reduce replayability during flaky triage.
all_violations.suggestion: Allow deterministic correlation ID override from testInfo-based helper.

all_violations.description: CSRF token defaults are randomized in factory output.
all_violations.suggestion: Use deterministic token helper for repeatable debug reproduction when needed.

all_violations.description: All tests use fixed thread IDs, increasing risk of cross-test state leakage when run concurrently against mutable environments.
all_violations.suggestion: Suffix thread IDs per test worker or inject per-test namespace in fixture factory.

all_violations.description: Lifecycle-mutating outbound actions run against shared story thread identities without explicit teardown/reset hooks.
all_violations.suggestion: Add test-scoped thread seeds or cleanup reset endpoint after mutation tests.

all_violations.description: Each E2E test reuses same login path and actor identity without explicit isolation assertions.
all_violations.suggestion: Introduce test-scoped auth/session fixture with clearer setup boundary.

all_violations.description: API ATDD file is 350 lines, exceeding TEA <300-line maintainability guardrail.
all_violations.suggestion: Split by acceptance-criterion clusters (contract matrix, override flow, lifecycle reopen, envelope feedback).

all_violations.description: Single describe block carries multiple distinct concerns, increasing cognitive load and change blast radius.
all_violations.suggestion: Create AC-scoped describe blocks/files with shared helpers for request/response assertions.
all_violations.code_snippet: test.describe('Story ux-r4 Outbound Policy Guardrail UI (ATDD API)', ... )

all_violations.description: Priority tags exist but stable traceable case IDs are missing in test titles.
all_violations.suggestion: Prefix titles with immutable IDs (e.g., UXR4-API-001).

all_violations.description: Context creation + login setup repeats across tests and can be extracted to fixture layers.
all_violations.suggestion: Use authenticated fixture/storageState and story context fixture composition.

all_violations.description: Action-label helper is local to file and may diverge from similar suites over time.
all_violations.suggestion: Move common assertion helpers into shared test utility module.

all_violations.description: Several inline payload literals and message strings reduce reuse and can drift from fixture defaults.
all_violations.code_snippet: data: { orgUnitId: ..., channel: 'sms', body: 'Deterministic policy-safe outbound follow-up.' }

all_violations.description: API ATDD coverage validates success/refusal envelopes but does not assert system error envelope behavior from live API.
all_violations.suggestion: Add API case asserting canonical `error` envelope semantics and deterministic UI metadata contract where applicable.
all_violations.code_snippet: [P1] success and refusal envelopes expose deterministic accessible feedback metadata

all_violations.description: Suite lacks explicit unauthorized/forbidden outbound action checks for non-member role or org-unit mismatch.
all_violations.suggestion: Add one negative access-control test path for outbound send/call endpoints.
all_violations.code_snippet: // no dedicated 403/401 ux-r4 assertion in ATDD suite

all_violations.description: Invalid override reason path is present in automate expansion but not in core ux-r4 ATDD suite.
all_violations.suggestion: Promote one invalid-override path into core ATDD to keep baseline contract complete.
all_violations.code_snippet: [P1] nested override payload fields are accepted ...

all_violations.description: Each E2E test performs full UI login flow, increasing runtime and noise for functional assertions.
all_violations.suggestion: Use storageState/session fixture to reuse authenticated context.

all_violations.description: Lifecycle matrix test performs three navigations in one test body.
all_violations.suggestion: Split into parameterized cases or keep as-is if preserving matrix intent is preferred.
all_violations.code_snippet: await page.goto(...unclaimed); ... await page.goto(...claimed); ... await page.goto(...closed);

high_severity_violations.description: API ATDD file is 350 lines, exceeding TEA <300-line maintainability guardrail.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Split by acceptance-criterion clusters (contract matrix, override flow, lifecycle reopen, envelope feedback).

high_severity_violations.description: Single describe block carries multiple distinct concerns, increasing cognitive load and change blast radius.
high_severity_violations.suggestion: Create AC-scoped describe blocks/files with shared helpers for request/response assertions.
high_severity_violations.code_snippet: test.describe('Story ux-r4 Outbound Policy Guardrail UI (ATDD API)', ... )

top_10_recommendations.recommendation: Split ux-r4 API suite into smaller AC-focused files
Add stable test IDs for durable traceability
Extract repeated login/context setup into reusable fixtures
Remove conditional assertion gating for thread-id continuity checks
Use deterministic fixture IDs/tokens in debug or CI replay mode
Keep envelope-mock branches isolated by test scenario for clearer failure diagnosis
Make thread IDs test-scoped to avoid order-dependent behavior
Use isolated auth/session fixture boundaries for E2E cases
Add API-level system error envelope test
